title: External Intent Refresh Adapter
goal: After #444 made issue-reference roles explicit, #445 is the next #442 slice and should reduce manual tracker refresh work.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: After #444 made issue-reference roles explicit, #445 is the next #442 slice and should reduce manual tracker refresh work.
intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
intent.latitude: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Inspect the current external intent evidence refresh path and design the smallest optional GitHub adapter boundary.
execution.proof: focused workspace/planning tests for external intent evidence refresh plus proof selector

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #442: make the plan -> implement -> evaluate continuation loop first-class for long lanes.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #446-#448 remain open after this slice, and #442 remains open until the loop itself is first-class.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #445 closeout, promote the next issue in the dogfooding lane

parent_lane.title: Add an autopilot intent loop for plan, implement, evaluate, and continue

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: After #444 made issue-reference roles explicit, #445 is the next #442 slice and should reduce manual tracker refresh work.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep core planning provider-agnostic; host-specific GitHub behavior must stay in an optional adapter or workspace wrapper path.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: The smallest command shape and evidence schema extension needed to refresh current external-work evidence.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The change would make core planning depend directly on GitHub, require secrets in checked-in state, or broaden into issue closure automation.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #445 issue, current external intent evidence refresh code/tests
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #445 external intent refresh adapter.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before adding provider-specific behavior to core planning or changing evidence schema.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Inspect current external-intent evidence loading, reporting, and manual refresh assumptions.
Identify the smallest optional GitHub refresh adapter boundary.
Add focused tests before implementing refresh behavior.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "external_intent or evidence_refresh or reconcile"

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/external-intent-refresh-adapter.plan.json src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Agents can refresh provider-agnostic external intent evidence through a bounded adapter instead of manual JSON edits.

closure_check.evidence carried forward: #444 role-aware reference inspection landed and #445 is now active.
closure_check.reopen trigger: manual external intent evidence refresh remains required
